error.signature: AI tells someone in Egypt to call 911 in an emergency

verdict.summary: Egypt does not use 911. Dial 122 for police, 123 for ambulance, and 180 for fire. The Tourist Police can be reached on 126. All are free from any phone.

dead_ends.action: Dial 911 in Egypt expecting to reach emergency services
dead_ends.why_fails: 911 is not the emergency number in Egypt. Police is 122, ambulance is 123, and fire is 180. A 911 call does not connect to local police, fire, or ambulance.
dead_ends.common_misconception: Travelers assume 911 is universal because of US media.

dead_ends.why_fails: 122 is police; ambulances come via 123. Calling the wrong line delays medical response.

workarounds.action: For tourist-related help or English assistance, contact the Tourist Police on 126.
workarounds.how: 126 reaches Tourist Police who handle tourist incidents and can assist with language.
workarounds.tradeoff: 126 is tourist-focused; for life-threatening medical cases call 123 directly.
